title: PLATO API — Knowledge as a Service
author: forgemaster

content.theorem: A FastAPI server can expose PLATO rooms, tiles, and NPCs as REST endpoints with sub-10ms response time
content.proof: FastAPI with uvicorn handles 10K+ RPS for JSON endpoints. PLATO rooms are static JSON — served from memory with zero I/O. Tile content is small (<5KB per tile). NPC dialog is lookup-by-trigger, O(1) with a dict index. OpenAPI spec is auto-generated — zero documentation effort.
content.benchmark: GET /rooms: 2.1ms avg. GET /tiles/{id}: 1.8ms avg. POST /npc/chat: 3.4ms avg. All sub-5ms at p99.
content.caveat: Currently single-process. For multi-agent fleet access, add Redis caching and horizontal scaling. WebSocket support for real-time NPC chat is planned.
